metadata.title: Mohamed Hesham | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Full Stack Developer specializing in JavaScript, Next.js, DevOps, AI/LLM training, and automation.

hero.name: Mohamed Hesham
hero.roles: Full Stack Developer|DevOps Engineer|AI/LLM Specialist|Automation Expert
hero.title: I build digital experiences that matter.
hero.description: Full Stack Developer with deep roots in the JavaScript ecosystem, hands-on DevOps experience, and a passion for training large language models and building smart automation systems. From pixel-perfect frontends to resilient cloud infrastructure — I ship end to end.

projects.title: A small selection of {highlight}
projects.noResults: No projects found matching your criteria.

about.intro: I'm Mohamed Hesham — a Full Stack Developer who doesn't just write code, but architects complete solutions. My work spans the entire lifecycle: from designing intuitive interfaces and building robust APIs, to deploying on cloud infrastructure and training AI models that power intelligent features.
about.introExtended: JavaScript is my foundation. I've built production applications with Next.js, React, Node.js, and TypeScript — but I don't stop at the web layer. I've designed CI/CD pipelines, managed containerized deployments, automated repetitive workflows, and fine-tuned large language models for real-world applications. I bring a rare combination of frontend polish, backend depth, and infrastructure expertise to every project.
about.expertiseTitle: What I Bring to the Table
about.expertiseSubtitle: A multi-disciplinary skill set that covers the full spectrum of modern software development.
about.fullStackDescription: End-to-end application development with JavaScript at the core. I build responsive, accessible frontends with React and Next.js, design scalable APIs with Node.js, and manage databases with PostgreSQL and MongoDB. From concept to deployment — I handle it all.
about.devOpsDescription: Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, containerized deployments with Docker, cloud infrastructure on AWS and Vercel, and infrastructure-as-code practices. I ensure applications are not just built right, but deployed and scaled right.
about.aiDescription: Hands-on experience training and fine-tuning large language models for production use cases. From data preparation and prompt engineering to model evaluation and deployment — I build AI-powered features that deliver real business value.
about.automationDescription: Automating repetitive workflows, building internal tooling, scripting deployment processes, and creating developer experiences that boost team productivity. If it can be automated, I automate it.
about.fullStackSkills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, REST APIs, GraphQL
about.devOpsSkills: Docker, CI/CD, AWS, Vercel, Linux, Nginx, GitHub Actions
about.aiSkills: LLM Fine-tuning, Prompt Engineering, RAG, Data Pipeline, Model Evaluation
about.automationSkills: Scripting, Workflow Automation, Developer Tooling, Testing Pipelines
about.journeySubtitle: A timeline of growth, learning, and building.
about.journey1Description: Started my journey into software development, drawn by the power of turning ideas into working applications. JavaScript became my first language and has remained my foundation ever since.
about.journey2Description: Deepened my expertise across the entire stack — mastering React and Next.js on the frontend, Node.js on the backend, and modern databases. Built production applications serving real users.
about.journey3Description: Expanded into DevOps, containerization, and cloud infrastructure. Learned to build CI/CD pipelines, manage deployments, and ensure applications run reliably at scale.
about.journey4Description: Entered the world of large language models and AI. Started training and fine-tuning LLMs, building RAG systems, and creating automation solutions that leverage AI to solve complex problems efficiently.
about.philosophySubtitle: Principles that guide every line of code I write.
about.philosophy1Description: I don't hand off half-finished work. From the first pixel to the final deployment, I own the full delivery — ensuring quality at every layer.
about.philosophy2Description: If a task is repeated more than twice, it gets automated. I build tooling and pipelines that eliminate toil and let teams focus on what matters.
about.philosophy3Description: Technology moves fast and I move with it. I continuously explore new tools, frameworks, and approaches — not for the hype, but to solve real problems better.
about.philosophy4Description: Every architecture decision considers tomorrow. I write code that's clean, tested, and ready to grow — because successful products don't stay small forever.
